markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publishing Shift:** Moving from a daily cadence to publishing articles in weekly batches (up to 5 at once) for operational efficiency and faster SEO indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [**Branding Nuance:** Top-of-funnel content must differentiate Ambient's unique capabilities (e.g., 150+ signatures) from generic industry features to avoid diluting the brand and hurting SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [**Performance Audit:** Investigating a January site-wide impression decline, potentially linked to the Dec 4th Webflow migration, to determine if it's a critical issue or a positive shift to higher-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [**Strategic Planning:** A goal-setting session is scheduled for next week to finalize the 2026 content plan, providing a clear strategy for the upcoming executive meeting and sales kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Publishing

  - [**Publishing Cadence:** Shifting from a daily schedule to weekly batches (up to 5 articles at once).](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Smoother operations and faster SEO indexing (gains 4–5 days per article).](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
      - [**Note:** Homepage traffic is low, so batching won't negatively impact discovery.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [**Author Variety:** Increasing the number of authors to improve content diversity.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [**New Authors:** Kiran, Jody, all SEs, and all CSMs.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [**Action:** Everest to create Webflow profiles and provide guidance on author rotation.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**"Versus" Content:** Resuming the "versus" article series next week.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This content format is a top performer.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
      - [**Enabler:** Improved research pipeline and new positioning from Ambient's messaging doc.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [**White Paper Review:** Everest to send recent white papers to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
      - [**Potential Uses:** Inform the glossary, provide unique insights, and support competitive positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)

### Branding & SEO

  - [**Branding in Content:** Clarifying the strategy for using branded terms in educational content.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [**Goal:** Balance brand mentions to avoid a "salesy" tone and protect SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [**Rule:** Differentiate Ambient's unique capabilities from generic industry features.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
          - [**Example:** "AI platforms offer threat detection. *Ambient Threat Detection* provides the industry's largest library of 150+ signatures."](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
      - [**Note:** "Ambient Threat Detection" must be capitalized as a product name.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [**Keyword Strategy:** Evaluating the use of related keywords like "spatial intelligence" and "contextual AI."](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
      - [**Decision:** De-prioritize "spatial intelligence" (legacy term from 2019 occupancy insights).](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
      - [**Decision:** Use "contextual AI" sparingly; the current focus is "reasoning AI."](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Guideline:** GrowthX can propose high-volume related keywords for 1–2 articles, not full series.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)

### Performance & Reporting

  - [**Looker Dashboard:** The dashboard now filters out non-target market traffic (e.g., from China), providing a cleaner view of performance in key regions (US, NZ).](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [**Organic Search:**](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
      - [**Status:** Queries in the 2–10 position have plateaued.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will identify optimization candidates to push them to page one.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [**Site-Wide Impressions:** A decline in January impressions was flagged.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** Potentially linked to the Dec 4th Webflow migration.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [**Analysis:** Clicks remained stable, suggesting a positive shift to higher-intent traffic (dropping low-value queries).](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will audit the impression decline by page to confirm the cause and impact.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)

### Planning & Tools

  - [**Goal-Setting Session:** A dedicated session is scheduled for next week to finalize the 2026 content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Provides a clear plan for the upcoming executive meeting and sales kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tool:** GrowthX's new tool will be demoed next week, with login access provided to Ambient.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
      - [**Features:** Edit prompts, view citations, and gain transparency into the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Everest:**](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [Create Webflow author profiles for Kiran, Jody, SEs, and CSMs.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [Provide guidance to GrowthX on author rotation.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
      - [Send recent white papers to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
      - [Send available time blocks for the goal-setting session next week.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
      - [Audit the January impression decline to determine the cause and impact.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
      - [Deliver the January monthly report and a content program overview next week.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
      - [Demo the AI Visibility Tool and provide login access next week.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
      - [Schedule the goal-setting session for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/X-ZytPA7GJFzn4eiYNpgxWEVwjnraNre?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
